description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSYS2 PKGBUILD that triggers on push events with tags matching v* and on workflow dispatch. Run a matrix job on windows-latest for various MSYS2 environments, each with different settings for renderer, poppler, mupdf, and qt versions. For each matrix entry, check out the repository, set up MSYS2, build a package using makepkg, upload the package as an artifact, install it, and test it.
